title: digitaria commutata subsp. eriantha
intro: Digitaria commutata subsp. eriantha, also known as the hairy panic grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe various health issues. The health benefits of Digitaria commutata subsp. eriantha include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to support wound healing and skin health. Digitaria commutata subsp. eriantha can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
